conversations.content:
Hi, I want to try two restaurants in Paris today. For lunch, please recommend some restaurants that serves French cuisine, find the one with the highest rating.
For dinner, I want to try a restaurant which serves Chinese cuisine, and find the one with the highest rating.
Tell me how much it costs to eat at each restaurant.

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request, I need to first gather information about all restaurants in Paris. This will help identify those that serve French and Chinese cuisines, and ascertain their ratings. Following the user's query, I will then check the costs associated with dining at the selected restaurants. Using the initialized function trajectory plan, I will proceed with executing the first function to get the list of restaurants in Paris.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean

<function_thought>
I have retrieved a list of restaurants in Paris. Next, I need to determine the cuisine types for these restaurants in order to find those serving French and Chinese cuisines. This will support identifying the highest-rated options for lunch and dinner as per the user's request.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_cuisine_type_for_restaurants(restaurant_names=["New Israeli Restaurant", "Breizh Café", "New Asiaway", "Le Baratin", "Bistrot Paul Bert", "Royal Panda", "The yard", "China Garden", "Miznon", "Chez L'Ami Jean"])]</function_call>

Next, I will gather ratings and reviews for the French restaurants to find the one with the highest rating for lunch.
</function_thought>
